examples: I intended to send you a governess or a nurse, or someone of that sort, but I forgot.
Please—please don't make me have a governess yet.
I am not going to have a governess for a long time!
Lady Charlotte Finch, the royal governess, supervised the arrangements for this new addition to the royal nursery.
Her first Tube journey was in May 1939 as a 13-year-old princess, accompanied by her sister Princess Margaret and governess, Marion Crawford.
